name: Sniper Simulator
short_description: Sniper simulation is a teaching application that accurately simulates the shooting trajectory.
detailed_description:
Sniper Simulator is a real sniping simulation app.


【Teaching mode】
The most valuable part of learning sniping.
  • Real sniping range card data and related shooting terms.
  • Use mil division to complete the distance measurement of the shooting target.
  • Query the range card and correct the sniper elevation.
  • Windage calculation at different wind speed and wind direction.
  • Windage correction by MOA and mil.

【Training mode】
The difficulty of shooting gradually increases. Apply the knowledge provided by the tutorial, experience the real calculation process of a sniper.

【Grassland roaming mode】
Wander through the vast grasslands. Silently lurking, with a light step, chasing the trail of prey.
